title: leptaulus holstii
intro: Leptaulus holstii, also known as the African fever plant, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leptaulus holstii include its ability to alleviate fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat various infections, such as the flu and respiratory infections. Leptaulus holstii is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
